instruction:
Deploy the Node-Watch API as a Docker container on port 9081. Use the files in /root/sovereign/shared/results/node-watch-api/.

Tasks:
1. Copy the API files to a deployment directory
2. Build and run the Docker container on port 9081
3. Test that the API is responding at http://localhost:9081/health
4. Verify the /api/v1/servers endpoint is accessible

The API should accept POST requests from monitoring agents and serve GET requests for the dashboard.

Create a deployment script that:
- Stops any existing container on port 9081
- Builds the new image
- Runs the container with proper environment variables
- Tests the endpoints
- Reports success/failure

Write the output to /root/sovereign/shared/results/api_deployment_status.md with the container status and endpoint test results.
